name: Southwestern Rice Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Frozen bell pepper stir-fry (from 1 lb package)
1.5 cups Can diced peeled tomatoes (with spicy seasonings), 14 1/2 oz
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. In an ungreased 1 1/2-quart casserole dish, combine all ingredients; mix well.
2. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
